data.title: ORCA proposal passed: 25 million tokens will be destroyed and a $10 million buyback plan will be launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News ORCA community's new proposal has been passed, including the destruction of 25 million tokens, the launch of a total of $10 million in open market buybacks, and the use of 20% of the protocol fees for continued token buybacks. (MMS NEWS)

data.title: Ripple to pay $50M fine in XRP? Garlinghouse drops hint
data.description:
In a fresh appearance, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse suggested that it might pay its $50 million SEC fine in XRP tokens
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-to-pay-50m-fine-in-xrp-garlinghouse/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 85,000 USDT with a 4.08% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 12, 2025, 14:32 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 85,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 85,076.671875 USDT, with a narrowed 4.08% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Andrew Kang: Trade war and "Trump Put" will help BTC reverse its multi-month downward trend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader Andrew Kang wrote that the current market clearing caused by the trade war and the expectation of "Trump Put" provide a perfect opportunity for BTC to reverse its multi-month downward trend. He hinted that BTC may usher in a strong rebound.
